name: Apple Bread Pudding
recipeIngredient: 1 pound loaf French bread, cut into 1/2 inch slices
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat electric oven to 350°F.
2. Butter slices of bread and place in a 13 x 9 x 2-inch baking pan.
3. Spread apple pie filling over bread.
4. Top with half cup of the nuts and raisins.
5. In a large bowl, combine eggs, milk, sugar, 1/4 cup brown sugar, salt, vanilla, and lemon extract; pour over bread, pressing down to soak bread with milk mixture.
6. Combine baking mix, remaining 1/2 cup nuts, and 1/3 cup brown sugar; cut in butter. Sprinkle over bread mixture.
7. Bake for 45 to 60 minutes or until knife inserted in center comes out clean. Makes 24 servings.
